IBERIA PARISH EMERGENCY MANAGER REPORTED APPROXIMATELY 20K -30K IN DAMAGE ALONG MULLINS ROAD AND BEN HOGAN DR. A 50X20 FOOT PIECE OF SHEET METAL ON A WOOD FRAME WAS TORN OFF A GARAGE AND THROWN APPROX 350 FEET. AN RV GARAGE WAS BENT. THREE SOUTH FACING METAL GARAGES WERE BENT INWARD. A FENCE WAS BENT TO THE GROUD. A UTILITY POLE WAS BENT. BOATS WERE BLOWN OFF OF TRAILERS AND INTO A FENCE. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.
